creator: sterling@camdensoftware.com
text:
PR ports/150608 makes the OWL license a known license with auto-acceptance.
	The sysutils/pcpustat port uses the OWL license, so the Makefile needs
	to be altered so that it doesn't specify license details.

Fix: Apply the following patch to ports/sysutils/pcpustat/Makefile:

How-To-Repeat: 	After applying the patch for PR ports/150608, a 'make' in ports/sysutils/pcpustat
	fails.
